creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: This slipped through the cracks while I had very little time for FreeBSD... I took a look at this today, and I think the Debian patch can be improved. I've posted a new version to the Debian bug: https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=897674#15 and would like to wait for some feedback before committing a fix to the tree.
